title: Eligibility for Admission
text: Title: Eligibility for Admission Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/pages-admission.php Admission inquiry note on the page: - 2026-27 Admission Open First semester B.Tech degree programme eligibility: - Passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects - One of Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology along with the compulsory subjects - At least 45 percent marks in the above subjects taken together - Reserved category candidates: 40 percent in the above subjects taken together Lateral entry into third semester of the eight semester B.Tech programme: - Diploma examination from an AICTE approved institution or DOTE approved with at least 50 percent marks - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent - B.Sc. degree from a recognized university defined by UGC with at least 50 percent marks and XII standard with Mathematics - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent - B.Sc. stream students shall clear Engineering Graphics / Engineering Drawing and Engineering Mechanics of the first year engineering programme along with second year subjects - B.Sc. stream students are considered after filling the supernumerary seats in this category with students from the Diploma stream - Students who have passed Diploma in Engineering and Technology or B.Sc.
notes: Eligibility, programme list, age limits, and contact details extracted.

title: Eligibility for Admission
text: degree are also eligible for first year Engineering Degree courses subject to vacancies if lateral entry vacancies are exhausted MCA eligibility: - Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration - Mathematics at 10+2 level - At least 50 percent at the qualifying examination - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent MBA eligibility: - Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration - At least 50 percent at the qualifying examination - Reserved category candidates: 45 percent Undergraduate courses listed on the page: - B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) - B.Tech Information Technology (IT) - B.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) - B.Tech Bio-Medical Engineering (BME) - B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AI&DS) - B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI&ML) Postgraduate courses listed on the page: - M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) - M.Tech Wireless Communication (WC) - MCA - MBA Age limit details on the page: - Candidates should not have completed 21 years of age as on 1st July of the academic year under consideration - Lateral entry candidates should not have completed 24 years as on 1st July of the academic year under consideration - SC/ST candidates have a relaxation of 3 years in both cases - MCA: No age limit - MBA: No age limit Admission contact shown on the page: - Dr. K.
notes: Eligibility, programme list, age limits, and contact details extracted.

title: Facilities For Students
text: Title: Facilities For Students Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/pages-facilities.php Students Grievance Cell: - The grievance cell looks into student grievances - Students may also express grievances online through the grievance form mentioned on the page Health Service: - The college doctor will be available in the college campus for consultation - Students can seek advice from the Medical Officer any time - Regular health check-ups will be conducted for students - Students can consult the college doctor even after college hours at his chamber - Hospital services are available at Mahatma Gandhi Medical College and Research Institute nearby the campus Transport: - The college has a fleet of 18 buses - Buses transport students and staff from various parts of the city and neighbouring areas to the college and back home - College bus facility is available to every student - The facility is extended for special coaching classes, placements and training, and campus drive occasions Internet Service: - Member of the National Knowledge Network (NKN) - NKN bandwidth: 40 Mbps - Additional BSNL internet connection: 100 Mbps - Network traffic is monitored and controlled through a firewall - A fiber-optic backbone has been laid to provide connectivity to various parts of the campus WiFi Connectivity: - Access points have been deployed in a few blocks in the campus Hostel Facilities: - The institution provides hostel facilities for boys and girls - Vegetarian food is provided - Lunch is provided inside the campus for all students - A separate hostel building with One Lakh Sq.
notes: Facilities sections extracted from approved page.

title: Application for college transfer from DBRAIT for Provisional admission at RGCET
text: Title: Application for college transfer from DBRAIT for Provisional admission at RGCET Source URL: http://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScqCk6KDPZtSmtAKZOHnXtA4FkJXbG84i5fzswBbzb99bIqLQ/viewform Official Google Form purpose: - Application for college transfer from DBRAIT for Provisional admission at RGCET Notes shown on the form: - Admission through transfer is subject to fulfillment of eligible conditions of Pondicherry University - After completion of official formalities and approval for transfer from Pondicherry University, admission will be confirmed - The student can attend classes in person by paying the necessary tuition fees
notes: Google Form purpose and transfer notes captured.

title: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
text: RAJIV GANDHI COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY KIRUMAMPAKKAM, PUDUCHERRY APPLICATION FOR CLAIM OF ATTENDANCE ON MEDICAL GROUNDS Date of application: From To, The Principal, Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology Puducherry THROUGH THE HEAD OF THE DEPARTMENT Respected Sir, I could not attend my regular classes from ______________ to _______________ (both days inclusive) on account of the following illness :_____________________________ __________________________________________________________________. Medical Certificate dated _______________ issued by Dr.___________________________________ as required by rules is herewith attached. Yours faithfully, (Signature of Student) (Countersign of Parent/ Guardian) (P.T.O.) ….2…. Rules: 1. Fully completed and signed application form should be submitted to the office of the Principal through the Head of the Department concerned during office hours on any working day within THREE DAYS of resuming attendance. 2. An official receipt will be given by the office on submission of application. The receipt should be preserved by the student. 3. Medical Certificate without specifying the exact dates will not be accepted. 4. If student is absent for more than three days, details of medical report – pathology test, X-ray reports etc. should be submitted. 5.
notes: PDF text extracted with rules and submission conditions.

title: Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds
text: Candidates who secure overall attendance greater than 60% and less than 75% alone will be eligible for condonation of attendance on medical grounds. 6. Medical Certificate should be issued by a medical officer not below the rank of Assistant Director. *********************************
notes: PDF text extracted with rules and submission conditions.

title: Placement Cell About
text: Title: Centre for Training Placement and Corporate Relations Source URL: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/placementcell_about.php Vision: - To empower students with industry-relevant skills, professional competence, and ethical values through comprehensive training and placement opportunities, fostering global career success and contributing to societal development Mission points on the page: - Build strong industry-academic collaborations for placement and internship opportunities - Provide personalized career counseling, soft skills training, and technical skill development programmes - Nurture leadership, teamwork, and problem-solving abilities - Promote lifelong learning, adaptability, and innovation - Ensure equal placement opportunities while upholding ethical and professional standards About the Centre for Training, Placement, and Corporate Relations (CTPCR): - Serves as a bridge between academia and industry - Organizes training programmes such as workshops, seminars, and certification courses - Facilitates campus placements - Supports industry collaboration, internships, and live projects - Provides career counseling - Organizes aptitude and interview preparation - Promotes higher education guidance - Supports entrepreneurship - Encourages alumni engagement - Tracks industry trends - Conducts corporate outreach Notable recruiters listed on the page: - TCS - CTS - Capgemini - Accenture - Société Générale - HCL - Wipro - Zifo R&D - Tata Elxsi - ATOS - Hexaware - Renault Nissan Technology and Business Solutions - KAAR Technologies - Deloitte - Infosys
notes: CTPCR vision, mission, functions, and notable recruiters extracted.
